name: wedevs_pm_automation
description: End-to-end tests for weDevs Project Manager (Free)

scripts.test:parallel: CI=false pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.parallel-one.config.ts; CI=false pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.parallel-two.config.ts
scripts.test:parallel:ci: pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.parallel-one.config.ts; pnpm exec playwright test --config=playwright.parallel-two.config.ts
scripts.test:sharded: pnpm run test:setup && pnpm run test:parallel
scripts.test:sharded:ci: pnpm run test:setup:ci && pnpm run test:parallel:ci

author: weDevs QA
